data.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): Medium confidence on exact root cause — isolation:worktree base-commit selection is Claude Code harness behavior (not in this repo). Described staleness mechanism is plausible. Fix 1 (defense-in-depth): add rebase-on-entry to worktree-dispatch.md shared prompt so sub-agents always fetch-and-rebase onto orchestrator HEAD before working. Fix 2 (complementary): orchestrator records SESSION_HEAD_AT_DISPATCH in dispatch prompt; sub-agent verifies ancestry. ESCALATE: modifies LLM-behavioral shared prompt; requires harness-level testing to confirm root cause mechanism.
